Ready to build the future with one of Southern Norway’s most advanced technology teams?
Ready to build the future with one of Southern Norway’s most advanced technology teams?
We’re looking for a passionate developer to join our in-house development team and help shape the next generation of digital solutions at Gard. You’ll play a key role in evolving our existing systems to meet new business needs.
Working closely with your team, you’ll design and build new solutions that keep our business competitive and our technology stack modern.
Much of our work revolves around cross-technology APIs, enabling seamless integration across our systems and empowering development teams throughout the organisation.
What you will be part of
We’re amid an ambitious digital transformation - one that mirrors the evolution of the maritime industry itself. We’re developing critical platforms and capabilities to deliver high-quality digital services to both colleagues and customers.
At the heart of this transformation are our core systems, all developed, operated, and supported by our experienced in-house teams. As a member of the team, you’ll be involved throughout the entire lifecycle: from idea and design, through implementation and testing, to delivery, continuous improvement, and long-term growth.
Our teams are self-governing within the development area, giving you real ownership and influence. You’ll work on meaningful, varied tasks with full support to grow your skills across the technology stack. Strong communication skills are important, as you’ll collaborate closely with business users to turn needs into great solutions.
Who we’re looking for
Finding the right person matters more to us than ticking every box, but we believe a strong candidate will bring many of the following:
Solid experience with technologies such as C#, Azure, MVC, and modern databases
Experience from insurance or the financial industry
Excellent written and spoken English
Experience with Agile development methods, software architecture, and DevOps
An innovative, proactive, and creative mindset, combined with a strong business focus
A genuine interest in digital opportunities and how technology can improve Gard’s performance
A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, or a proven track record as a skilled software developer
Technologies and tools you’ll work with
We use a modern and diverse technology stack, including:
C#, ASP.NET, Entity Framework, Razor
JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, Vue, MVC
Microsoft SQL Server, Cosmos DB, Oracle
Azure Stack
Salesforce LWR/C
Mule
Git
Kanban and Scrum
What we offer
Strong pension and insurance benefits
The stability of a long-term, highly respected employer, combined with a dynamic and fast-moving tech environment
A collaborative, in‑house environment where technology is central to the business
A focus on work-life balance and sustainable ways of working
Access to company cabins and apartments, plus support for workout and health initiatives
An open and social culture with regular Gard events and knowledge sharing
Excellent opportunities for professional growth, learning, and international collaboration
Gard collaborates with Relocation Agder to provide excellent support for new colleagues moving from abroad - or relocating to Arendal. You can read more about this support here. Curious about life in Arendal? Take a look here to learn more about the city and the region.
Sounds interesting? Apply today!
If you have questions about the role, you can reach out to Steve Bibby.
We perform background checks on all relevant candidates through our partner EY.
Ferdigheter
AI-generert
ASP.NET
Azure AD
C# (Programmeringsspråk)

Oracle Database
Programvarearkitektur
Om arbeidsgiveren
For more than 100 years Gard, one of the world’s leading marine insurers, has been helping the marine industries to protect their assets and safeguard their income. Having expanded from our origins in southern Norway to a network of 13 offices across the globe, we have witnessed the impact the sea can have and have learnt a thing or two.
Despite our breadth and depth of experience and expertise, we try to learn something new every day to prepare our Members and clients for their next journey, and to find and deliver the right solutions. So, whenever the unexpected arises it is good to know that someone is ready, willing and able to assist; someone with expertise that has been refined for over a century.
It is not just what we do, but how we do it that delivers the best value in the market – matching our expertise with an unrivalled commitment to what we do. We will turn every stone to find a solution and see it carried through.
Such ability and dedication is rare, so we take great care in choosing, training and supporting our employees. The way we see it, our people are the difference between good and great.

Rapporter annonse

required_skills: Solid experience with C#, Azure, MVC, and modern databases
Experience with Agile development methods, software architecture, and DevOps
Innovative, proactive, and creative mindset with a strong business focus
Genuine interest in digital opportunities and how technology can improve performance

nice_to_have_skills: Experience from insurance or the financial industry
analysis.summary: A Developer role at Gard, a leading global marine insurer, focused on evolving existing systems and building new digital solutions. The position involves working with a modern Microsoft-centric tech stack (C#, Azure, SQL Server) and agile methodologies. The company explicitly offers relocation support for international hires.
analysis.why_foreigner_friendly: The job ad is written entirely in English, explicitly states 'Engelsk' as the working language ('Arbeidsspråk'), and requires 'Excellent written and spoken English'. Crucially, Gard collaborates with 'Relocation Agder to provide excellent support for new colleagues moving from abroad', which is a strong indicator of visa sponsorship and comprehensive relocation assistance. Gard is a large, international company, further supporting its capacity to sponsor work permits. There are no Norwegian language requirements or mentions of security clearance.
